level_signals: Leading complex cross-functional initiatives in high-growth, fast-moving environments
Scope spans cross-company operational programs and infrastructure investments

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 10+ years of program management experience leading complex cross-functional initiatives in high-growth, fast-moving environments.
Experience building and scaling operational processes, service models, and operating frameworks across technical and operational teams.
A strong track record improving internal operations, workplace technology, support environments, or other large-scale service-oriented programs.
Excellent judgment and execution skills, with the ability to drive prioritization, alignment, and sustained momentum across multiple teams and competing demands.
Strong communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to operate effectively with both technical and non-technical partners.

scope.surface: IT Operations across Employee Technology & Experience (ETX) — IT Support, employee lifecycle operations, meeting room and calendaring services, onsite support, vending, research support environments, and internal infrastructure
primary_metrics_inferred: Scalability and readiness of IT services
Completion and durable follow-through of cross-functional initiatives
core_responsibilities: Lead cross-functional operational programs that improve scalability, consistency, and operational maturity.
Drive operational excellence initiatives across IT Support, employee lifecycle operations, meeting room and calendaring services, onsite support, vending, and research support environments.
Build operating models, readiness plans, escalation paths, governance cadences, and success metrics for complex operational programs.
Partner with technical teams to ensure new deployments, infrastructure investments, and internal platforms are operationally ready and sustainably supported at scale.
Drive high-priority operational programs supporting company growth, including infrastructure expansion, operational integrations, and other emerging initiatives.
Improve operational visibility, stakeholder alignment, and coordination across long-running cross-functional initiatives.
Create clarity across complex operational programs by establishing clear ownership, execution plans, operational accountability, and durable follow-through.
Own intake, prioritization, coordination, and completion of operational work originating from cross-functional teams and stakeholders.

green_flags: Clear scope and ownership — ETX team and its sub-domains are well-defined
High-impact role at a top-tier AI company with rapid growth trajectory
Equal opportunity employer statement and accommodations commitment are present
Role spans multiple high-visibility internal domains (support, identity, endpoints, AV, SaaS)
red_flags: Location not specified in JD body — unclear if remote, hybrid, or onsite
No nice-to-haves listed, making it harder to gauge what differentiates candidates
10+ year floor is a hard bar with no flexibility language
